narrative:
Precinct Byesville A (precinct in Guernsey County) has 577 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
